market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Bitcoin tumbles to new multi-year low of $58,000, but a short-squeeze setup emerges
articles.description: Derivatives markets signal that betting on further slide in prices is getting overcrowded, setting up for a potential snapback.

articles.title: Crypto for Advisors: Bitcoin: planning for inheritance
articles.description: Your bitcoin isn’t just an asset; it’s a future. Ensure your loved ones can access it with a solid inheritance plan for when you're no longer here.

articles.title: Why Wall Street values some crypto firms for AI power, not just crypto
articles.description: Galaxy Digital’s stock surge points to a new trend: Investors are rewarding some crypto firms for AI infrastructure, not just digital asset exposure.

articles.title: Story Protocol rebrands to DATA Foundation in AI pivot
articles.description: Story Protocol is now the DATA Foundation as it aims to provide licensable data to AI firms that have “run out of internet to scrape.”

articles.title: Netris raises $15M Series A from a16z to help AI neoclouds go live faster
articles.description: Netris provides software that runs on network switches, and offers a platform that helps neocloud operators reduce the time it takes to go live.

articles.title: Apple raises Mac and iPad prices, spares iPhone for now
articles.description: Apple raises prices of MacBook Air and Pro along with iPad Air and Pro

articles.title: Bitcoin likely to fall another 30% to $44,000 by year-end, prominent BTC miner says
articles.description: An early miner says Strategy's stock mNAV has fallen to 0.72, near the level that marked the last cycle's turn, and that bitcoin historically bottoms about six months after that signal.

articles.title: 地球正下著億年前的星塵細雨？4,800 公尺深海膠囊揭開「千級新星」大爆炸之謎
articles.description: 宇宙中的重元素究竟是在何處誕生的？雖然科學家早已證實「核心塌縮超新星」是鐵-60 等元素的來源，但像是鈽-24 […]

articles.title: Trump admin proposes axing brake-pedal requirement for AVs in a boost for Tesla
articles.description: The Department of Transportation wants to remove the brake-pedal requirement for vehicles "designed to be driven exclusively by automated driving systems."

articles.title: Kraken sues crypto derivatives firm PowerTrade over 'misappropriated' funds claim
articles.description: PowerTrade changed Kraken’s positive balance of around $7 million to a $2 million deficit via a series of unauthorized “corrections” related to trades that had expired or settled months earlier, according to a legal filing.

articles.title: Adobe acquires image and video enhancement tool maker Topaz Labs
articles.description: Adobe said that it will integrate Topaz Labs' tools across its apps.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: AAVE gains 10.1% as index rises
articles.description: Bitcoin Cash (BCH), up 5.8% from Wednesday, joined Aave (AAVE) as a top performer.

articles.title: SBI to acquire Bitbank in $289M deal creating Japan's biggest crypto exchange
articles.description: The Japanese financial conglomerate plans to take full control of Bitbank as it expands an ecosystem spanning crypto trading, stablecoins, tokenization and blockchain infrastructure.

articles.title: Uniswap, Spark aim to build stablecoin FX market as banks, fintechs enter the industry
articles.description: The protocols are building shared liquidity and trading infrastructure for a future with hundreds of competing digital currencies on blockchain rails.

articles.title: Post-prison CZ says time behind bars didn't hurt the billionaire's business after Binance
articles.description: The pardoned ex-CEO called prison a character-building "plus" as he's pursued a venture-capital career, despite his majority stake in the world's biggest crypto exchange.

articles.title: About 60% of World Cup bettors on Polymarket are first-time crypto users
articles.description: Polymarket emerged as an onboarding layer for about 60% of World Cup bettors, who interacted with the blockchain for the first time during their prediction market entry.

articles.title: Spark migrates $150M in stablecoin to Uniswap to advance shared liquidity
articles.description: Spark deployed approximately $150 million across two Uniswap v4 pools on Ethereum, while its DualPool hook and Shared Liquidity Layer are planned for later phases.

articles.title: Circle and Nomura join forces to target a $440 billion daily foreign exchange market in Japan
articles.description: The stablecoin giant and the Japanese financial corporation plan to deploy cross-border foreign exchange settlements as early as next year.

articles.title: Binance faces EU service limits next week as MiCA rules take effect
articles.description: Binance will limit EU onboarding and services from July 1 under MiCA rules after failing to gain authorization from a member state, while withdrawals remain available for users.
